query.text:
declare @unit varchar(128), @status nvarchar(8), @custID nvarchar(64) select @custID = '%' + rtrim(@ma_kh) + '%', @unit = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end
exec MaxvOnline$App$Voucher$Finding 'SO1', 'c64$000000', 'm64$', 'i64$', 'ngay_ct', 'convert(char(6), {0}, 112)', 'dateadd(month, 1, {0})', '000000', @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @custID, '', 'stt_rec', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct, dien_giai,t_tien_nt2,ma_nt,status', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct, dien_giai,t_tien_nt2,ma_nt,a.status,b.statusname%l', 'a left join dmttct b on a.status = b.status where b.ma_ct = ''SO1''', 'ngay_ct, so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, '', '', '1, 3', '0', @unit
